title: Philips Solar Security Outdoor LED 6500K, Solar-Powered Flood w/PIR Motion Sensor, Remote Control w/16ft Cable, IP65 Waterproof, 3 Modes (1)
features: HIGH BRIGHTNESS AND REMOTE CONTROL – Our solar floodlight boasts high-brightness LEDs that emit a cool daylight color temperature of 6500K, producing a brightness of 800 lumens. The light modes could be changed by remote controller without climbing to high places to change the light settings.

HIGH-SENSITIVITY SENSOR AND 3 LIGHTING MODES – The PIR sensor on our light can detect ambient motion with a 8 m sensing range and 120° induction angle, and activate 3 nighttime lighting modes. These modes are: motion-activated 100% brightness for 20 seconds, always-on 2% brightness with motion-activated 100% brightness for 20 seconds and switch to mode 1 after 6 hours, or always-on 10% brightness for 4 hours and then switch to mode 1.

MULTIPLE USES AROUND THE HOME - The Philips solar security light is versatile and can be used in various outdoor locations like the garden, yard, garage, pathways, front door, and more. With its PIR sensor, high light output, and multiple lighting modes, it is deal choice for enhancing security and illuminating dark areas.

UPGRADED SOLAR PANEL AND HIGH-CAPACITY BATTERY - Our outdoor solar light features an upgraded polycrystalline solar panel that enhances durability and corrosion resistance. The solar conversion rate has improved, and the high-capacity 2000 mAh battery allows for shorter charging times and extended usage periods.

WEATHERPROOF AND EASY TO INSTALL - Our outdoor solar light is tested for corrosion and rust resistance in various weather conditions like heavy rain, high humidity, high sun and UV exposure, and extreme temperatures with IP65 rating. It is easy to install with all necessary accessories and instructions included, and no wiring is required. It comes pre-assembled and ready to install out of the box.
